name: Sichuan Tianyi Comheart Telecom Co., Ltd.
summary: Sichuan Tianyi Comheart Telecom Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, sells, and services optical and mobile communication products in China. Its products include physical links and protective devices in communication networks, broadband network terminal equipment, mobile communication network optimizing system equipment, and heat shrinkable products and communication pipes. The company also provides system integration services. Sichuan Tianyi Comheart Telecom Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Chengdu, China.
